title: Dekton 2-Pack Car Magnetic 'P' Plate | Easy Removal & Fitting | Ideal for Any Vehicles | Complies with Department of Transport Regulations | Strong Magnetic Hold | Perfect for New Drivers
features: Strong Magnetic Hold – The Dekton 2 Pack Magnetic Plate provides a secure and reliable attachment to any vehicle with strong magnetic backing, ensuring it stays firmly in place during your journeys, even at high speeds. Ideal for both short commutes and long-distance trips.

Easy to Apply and Remove – Designed for convenience, the magnetic plates can be effortlessly applied or removed without any tools or damage to your vehicle. Simply place them on a flat metal surface, and they’re ready to go. Perfect for new drivers who need a temporary solution.

Complies with Regulations – These plates are fully compliant with Department of Transport regulations, ensuring you meet all legal requirements for displaying your P Plates as a new driver. A safe and stress-free way to hit the road while meeting driving regulations.

Universal Fit for Any Vehicle – Whether you drive a car, van, or SUV, these magnetic P Plates are suitable for any vehicle type. They adhere firmly to any magnetic surface, making them perfect for a wide range of vehicles and ensuring visibility from a distance.

Reusable and Durable – Constructed with durability in mind, the magnetic P Plates are reusable and can withstand weather conditions like rain, wind, and sun. Built to last, they provide long-term use without fading or losing their grip, ensuring reliable performance for as long as needed.
description: The Dekton Car Magnetic 'P' Plate 2 Pack is the perfect solution for new drivers. Featuring strong magnetic backing, these plates securely attach to any vehicle, ensuring they stay in place even during long or high-speed trips. Easy to apply and remove, they leave no marks or damage, making them a convenient temporary solution. Fully compliant with Department of Transport regulations, these plates ensure you meet all legal requirements. Designed for universal fit, they’re compatible with cars, vans, and SUVs, making them ideal for any vehicle type. Built to withstand tough weather conditions, these durable plates offer long-term use without fading or losing magnetic strength. Reusable and reliable, the Dekton Magnetic 'P' Plates provide a stress-free and legal way to hit the road with confidence.
